title: What Does Your Soulmate Look Like?
description: Through simple questions, dive deep into your subconscious to find the soul fragment that best matches yours.

questions.text: If you walked into a mysterious forest, what would you notice first?

options.text: Gentle sunlight filtering through the leaves
Soft, moss-covered ground beneath your feet
The call of an unknown bird in the distance
The scent of flowers and grass drifting in the air

questions.text: Deep in the forest, there's a wooden cabin. The person who opens the door gives you what kind of feeling?

options.text: Warm with a welcoming smile
Quiet with deep, thoughtful eyes
Cheerful and full of energy
Mysterious and wise

questions.text: The person hands you a drink. What is it?

options.text: A steaming cup of sweet hot cocoa
A light, subtly sweet hot tea
A colorful fruit juice
Sparkling water in an elegant glass

questions.text: A painting hangs on the cabin wall. What scene does it depict?

options.text: Two silhouettes cuddling by a fireplace
A calm, still lake
A group of people laughing at a meadow picnic
A vast, deep starry sky

questions.text: You find a treasure box in the cabin. What's inside?

options.text: A warm, soft scarf
A yellowed handwritten diary
A map leading to an unknown land
A crystal ball emitting a faint glow

questions.text: As you leave, the person gives you a gift. What do you think it is?

options.text: A dried flower
A handmade bookmark
A small compass
A miniature mirror

questions.text: On your way back, you encounter a fork in the road. How do you choose?

options.text: Take the safest and most reliable path
Take the quietest, least traveled path
Take the most interesting-looking path
Close your eyes and follow your intuition

questions.text: It starts raining on the way back. What do you do?

options.text: Take shelter under someone's eaves
Open the umbrella you brought along
Follow your instinct and run home quickly
Enjoy the feeling of raindrops on your skin

questions.text: After the rain stops, what appears in the sky?

options.text: A rainbow stretching across the horizon
A brilliant sunset breaking through the clouds
A few butterflies dancing gracefully
The first star shining at the edge of the sky

questions.text: After returning home, what's the first thing you want to do?

options.text: Call your closest person to share today's adventure
Quietly take a hot bath and organize your thoughts
Look through photos and plan the next adventure
Write today's feelings in a diary

results.title: The Morning Light Guardian
results.description: You inwardly crave a stable and gentle relationship. Your ideal partner is someone who provides firm support when you're vulnerable, someone as warm as morning light. They don't need fancy words — just a tender gaze and arms that are always open for you.
results.comment: Tips: Your current pace is great, but occasionally showing your vulnerable side can deepen your relationship.

results.title: The Deep Sea Listener
results.description: You need a partner who can have soul-deep conversations with you. They may not talk much, but they can read your every glance and give you the deepest understanding and acceptance. Between you, silence can also be a comfortable form of communication.
results.comment: Tips: Your tolerance is the greatest lubricant in a relationship, but remember that putting your own feelings first is equally important.

results.title: The Breeze Companion
results.description: You yearn for freedom and novelty. Your soulmate will be someone full of vitality who can explore the unknown with you, grow together, and share life's joys. You'll create countless memories together, becoming each other's best travel companion.
results.comment: Tips: Your passionate love can be contagious — try to slow down after the excitement to listen to your partner's subtle voice.

results.title: The Starlight Inspirer
results.description: You're drawn to wisdom and depth. Your ideal partner is someone with unique perspectives who constantly inspires you to see the world through a wider lens. Your conversations are always full of sparks, and your souls collide to create the most beautiful light.
results.comment: Tips: While pursuing the ultimate love, try to give each other some breathing room — distance can sometimes create incredible beauty.

title: What Animal Are You in Love?
description: Through scenario-based Q&A, discover the animal archetype hidden within your romantic personality.

questions.text: On a weekend afternoon, what would you most like to do?

options.text: Cuddle on the couch watching movies with your partner
Go to a café alone to read
Join a friend gathering for some fun
Go hiking or camping outdoors

questions.text: Your partner suddenly gives you a small gift. Your first reaction?

options.text: Happily hug them
Calmly say thanks while secretly rejoicing inside
Excitedly take a photo and post it on social media
Start thinking about what to buy in return

questions.text: When you have an argument with your partner, you usually…

options.text: Apologize first to keep the peace
Give the silent treatment, wait for them to come to you
Voice your dissatisfaction loudly
Analyze rationally, focus on who's right and who's wrong

questions.text: They accidentally break something you cherish. You would…

options.text: Feel sad but still say it's okay
Sulk silently
Directly complain about their carelessness
Ask them to buy a new one to compensate

questions.text: What do you think is most important in a relationship?

options.text: Mutual companionship and reliance
Maintaining individual independence
Creating happy memories together
Shared goals and values

questions.text: Your partner works late and comes home very late. You would…

options.text: Wait up and prepare a late-night snack for them
Go to bed first, everyone has their own rhythm
Text them to come home soon
Start worrying if something happened

questions.text: What kind of date do you prefer?

options.text: Walking hand in hand in the park, chatting
Each reading a book, occasionally exchanging glances
Going to an amusement park or escape room
Planning a future trip together

questions.text: How do you feel about 'acting cute' in a relationship?

options.text: Super natural! Want to be cute every day
Occasionally fine, but usually feels awkward
Usually express affection in a funny way instead
Prefer showing love through actions rather than words

questions.text: Your partner's friends invite them out without including you. How do you feel?

options.text: A bit disappointed, wish to be invited along
Great, finally some time to myself
Don't mind, make plans with your own friends too
Understand, but secretly curious about what they're doing

questions.text: If they say 'I need some space', your reaction is?

options.text: Worry if you did something wrong
Completely understand, think it's perfectly normal
Say it's fine, but feel uneasy inside
Respect their wish and use the time for self-improvement

results.title: The Clingy Puppy
results.description: In love, you crave tons of security and love being close to your partner. Even the smallest gesture can fill you with happiness. You're a tender and caring lover who always puts your partner first, but remember to keep some space for yourself too.
results.comment: Tips: Your current pace is great, but occasionally showing vulnerability can make your bond even deeper.

results.title: The Proud Tsundere Cat
results.description: You seem indifferent on the surface, but deep down you crave attention. You don't like expressing love directly but show tenderness in subtle ways. You need someone who can read the meaning behind your silence to truly enter your heart.
results.comment: Tips: Your tolerance is a great relationship lubricant, but remember that prioritizing your own feelings is equally important.

results.title: The Energetic Golden Retriever
results.description: You're full of passion, always bringing joy to your partner. When it comes to love, you're straightforward and never hide your feelings. You're a sunny, cheerful lover whose energy is infectious — every day with you is filled with laughter.
results.comment: Tips: Your passionate love is contagious — try to slow down and listen to your partner's subtle voice after the excitement.

results.title: The Independent Lone Wolf
results.description: You value personal space and autonomy highly, preferring not to rely too much on others. But once you've found your person, you show extreme devotion and loyalty. You prove your love through actions rather than words — a steady and profound lover.
results.comment: Tips: While pursuing the ideal romance, try to leave some breathing room for each other — distance can sometimes create incredible beauty.

title: What's Your Love Language in Flowers?
description: Each flower represents a different feeling. Discover the unique flower language that defines your love.

questions.text: Imagine walking into a flower shop. What scent greets you first?

options.text: Rich, alluring rose fragrance
Fresh, delicate jasmine scent
Sunny sunflower aroma
Elegant, cool lily fragrance

questions.text: You're choosing a bouquet for your partner. What main color?

options.text: Passionate, romantic reds
Pure, flawless whites
Bright, warm yellows
Mysterious, noble purples

questions.text: What wrapping material would you choose for the bouquet?

options.text: Glamorous, shiny ribbon
Simple, textured kraft paper
Colorful, vibrant tulle
Elegant, frosted paper

questions.text: What kind of card would you attach when sending flowers?

options.text: A card full of sweet words
Just a simple blessing
A card with cute drawings
A card with poetry or famous quotes

questions.text: How do you think your partner would react to receiving flowers?

options.text: Moved to tears, hugging you tightly
A gentle smile, saying thank you
Screaming with surprise, immediately taking photos
Carefully examining, praising how beautiful they are

questions.text: If flowers could talk, what would you want them to say for you?

options.text: "I will love you forever"
"Thank you for always being there"
"Every day with you is so happy"
"You're the most special person I've ever met"

questions.text: Where would you place the flowers at home?

options.text: Bedroom nightstand, so you see them when you wake up
On the desk, quietly accompanying your work
The most visible spot in the living room
By the window, letting sunlight fall on the petals

questions.text: After the flowers wither, what would you do?

options.text: Make them into dried flowers to keep forever
Take a photo as a memory, then let them go
Buy a new beautiful bouquet
Press a petal into your journal as a memento

questions.text: If you could design a new flower species, what trait would it have?

options.text: Blooms only under moonlight — a romantic nocturnal flower
Changes color with the season — beautiful in every form
Can sing — spreading joy to everyone around
Glows softly at night — a gentle beacon of light

questions.text: What does a 'perfect bouquet' mean to you?

options.text: Full of romantic roses, representing undying love
A clean, simple single stem, representing quiet companionship
Colorful mixed bouquet, like a party of happiness
Rare, hard-to-find species, representing one-of-a-kind love

results.title: Rose — Undying Passion
results.description: Your love is like a burning flame, full of passion and romance. You're willing to give everything for love and believe that sincere and steady devotion is the greatest expression of romance. Your love is direct and powerful, like a red rose in full bloom.
results.comment: Tips: Your passionate and dedicated love is admirable, but remember not to lose yourself. The best love allows both people to grow.

results.title: Jasmine — Silent Companionship
results.description: Your love is like a jasmine fragrance — not overwhelming, but ever-present. You believe the best love permeates daily life, and you show your care through subtle actions. You don't need grand gestures; your consistent presence is the full expression of your love.
results.comment: Tips: Your quiet love is very touching, but don't be afraid to express your feelings directly once in a while — your partner would love to hear your inner words.

results.title: Sunflower — Joyful Radiance
results.description: Your love is like sunshine itself, bringing warmth and joy to your partner. With an optimistic and cheerful personality, you make your lover feel happy and uplifted. Your love is direct, warm, and energetic — like a sunflower always facing the sun.
results.comment: Tips: Your joyful love energy is incredible, but remember to also create some quiet, intimate moments for just the two of you.

results.title: Lily — Transcendent Elegance
results.description: Your love is like a white lily — noble, elegant, and unforgettable. You seek a love that transcends the material, pursuing deep soul connection and spiritual resonance. Your love has weight and depth — understated yet captivating, like a lingering fragrance.
results.comment: Tips: Your love pursuit is admirable. While seeking soulmates, don't forget that everyday life's little moments are a part of love too — sometimes imperfection is true perfection.

title: Love Attachment Style Test
description: Do you tend toward anxiety or avoidance in relationships? Discover your attachment tendency through this quiz.

questions.text: Your new partner hasn't replied to your message for 3 hours. Your first thought?

options.text: They must be busy, I'll wait patiently
Maybe they haven't noticed — I'll do something else first
Are they ignoring me? Should I send another?
My mind starts racing with all kinds of scenarios

questions.text: Your partner wants to go on a solo trip. Your reaction?

options.text: Fully support them; personal growth time is important
A bit reluctant but won't stop them
Ask carefully if they want to include you
Feel uneasy; worry they might meet someone else

questions.text: In a new relationship, do you initiate sharing your inner world?

options.text: Naturally share when it feels right
Wait for a deeper connection before opening up
Often want to share but worry about burdening them
Find it difficult; building walls comes more naturally

questions.text: When saying goodbye after a date, you usually feel…

options.text: Happy about today, looking forward to next time
Relieved to finally have your own space again
Reluctant, wishing you could spend more time together
Anxious, already worried about when you'll meet again

questions.text: Your partner says 'You're really important to me.' Your inner reaction?

options.text: Feel touched and sincerely happy
Feel a bit pressured, unsure if you can match that
Then immediately think: Am I important enough?
Overwhelming happiness mixed with fear of losing it

questions.text: In your ideal relationship, how much personal time would you want?

options.text: Good balance of together time and alone time
More alone time; I need lots of personal space
Prefer spending most time together
Hard to decide; afraid being apart means growing distant

questions.text: How do you usually handle conflicts in relationships?

options.text: Calmly discuss, treating it as a chance for growth
Need to cool down first, then discuss rationally
Fear conflict will ruin the relationship, try to avoid it
Emotions get intense and hard to control

questions.text: When your partner praises another person, you feel…

options.text: Normal, everyone has their strengths
A slight twinge, but you won't show it
Instantly compare yourself — am I not good enough?
Jealousy that's hard to contain

questions.text: How much time after meeting someone would you ideally confirm a relationship?

options.text: Take time to get to know each other; no rush
Hope to keep things ambiguous a while; it's fun
If you feel right, you'd want to define it quickly
Fear rejection, so unsure when to bring it up

questions.text: If you feel insecure, what would you most likely do?

options.text: Honestly communicate your feelings with your partner
Hide it. You'll handle your own emotions
Repeatedly seek reassurance from your partner
Test them through indirect actions to see if they care

results.title: Secure Attachment
results.description: You have the healthiest attachment style! In relationships, you can be honest with your feelings, trust yourself and your partner. You don't rely excessively on others for security, nor do you fear intimacy. You're comfortable with both closeness and independence.
results.comment: Tips: Your emotional stability is your greatest asset. Keep being open and trusting — this will attract equally healthy relationship partners.

results.title: Avoidant Attachment
results.description: You tend to protect yourself through emotional distance. In intimate relationships, you value your personal space, sometimes appear emotionally detached, but it doesn't mean you don't care — you just show love in more reserved ways.
results.comment: Tips: Try to be more vulnerable sometimes. Opening up doesn't mean weakness — it means trusting the other person enough to let them in.

results.title: Anxious Attachment
results.description: Love is extremely important to you, but you're constantly worried about whether you're loved enough. You're very sensitive to your partner's every move and tend to overthink. Your love is deeply passionate, just sometimes accompanied by anxiety.
results.comment: Tips: Remember, your worth doesn't depend on your partner's response. Try to build more self-confidence, and you'll find your anxiety naturally decreases.

results.title: Fearful-Avoidant Attachment
results.description: You deeply desire intimacy but are simultaneously afraid of getting hurt. This makes you swing between craving closeness and pushing people away. Your emotional landscape is rich and complex — you need a particularly patient partner who understands.
results.comment: Tips: Recognizing your own patterns is the first step to change. Try noticing when you're pushing someone away — is it because you're afraid, or because you truly want distance?

title: Past Life Love Connection Test
description: Was your meeting fate or coincidence? Uncover your connections from a past life.

questions.text: You arrive at a mysterious ancient temple. What catches your eye first?

options.text: A glowing warm oil lamp
Ancient texts full of faded writing
A gorgeous mural depicting celestial beings
A mysterious hovering crystal in the center

questions.text: A fortune teller at the temple says your past life was…

options.text: A loving couple who looked after each other through hardship
A scholar and their devoted reader companion
Wandering performers who traveled the world together
A monarch and their trusted royal advisor

questions.text: An old chest appears before you. What's inside?

options.text: A pair of matching jade pendants
An ancient letter sealed with wax
An exquisite hand-painted fan
A half of a mysterious amulet

questions.text: You suddenly see a scene from your past life. What is it?

options.text: Two people sitting together watching the sunset by a riverbank
Someone reading alone under a tree in the rain
A lively festival marketplace full of noise and color
A vast starry sky with two silhouettes standing on a cliff

questions.text: If you could bring one item from your past life, what would it be?

options.text: A handmade gift from your past-life lover
A diary recording shared memories
A musical instrument played at many celebrations
A ring with mysterious protective powers

questions.text: What kind of promise do you think was made between you in a past life?

options.text: "Let's be together in the next life, just like now"
"Even if we can't be together, I hope we meet again"
"No matter where, I'll find you"
"Even across lifetimes, our souls will recognize each other"

questions.text: In your past life, what was the most important moment between you two?

options.text: Holding each other through a difficult time
A night of deep conversation that connected your hearts
Creating a beautiful work of art or music together
Making a life-changing decision together

questions.text: The fortune teller says your biggest challenge in this life's love will be…

options.text: Learning to let go and not hold too tight
Daring to speak your true feelings
Finding someone who matches your free spirit
Building trust after being hurt before

questions.text: As you leave the temple, a mysterious voice says to you…

options.text: "The person you're looking for is already by your side"
"True connection needs no words"
"Follow your heart; it knows the way"
"Your fate is already written in the stars"

questions.text: After leaving the temple, the emotion you feel most strongly is…

options.text: A warm sense of belonging
Peace and quiet understanding
Excitement and anticipation for what's coming
A profound feeling that everything is connected

results.title: Destined Reunited Lovers
results.description: You and your person were deeply in love in a past life, and fate has brought you together again in this one. Your love transcends time — you feel an inexplicable sense of familiarity and warmth. Your mission in this life is to complete the unfinished love story.
results.comment: Tips: This deep connection is beautiful, but remember to also build your present-life self. The best relationships are two complete people choosing each other.

results.title: Soulmate Across Time
results.description: In a past life, you were close but not romantically involved — perhaps friends or mentors. In this life, this connection has evolved into a deeper bond. Your relationship is special because it's built on understanding rather than just attraction.
results.comment: Tips: Cherish this unique bond. Don't compare your relationship to conventional romance — your connection is on a deeper, rarer level.

results.title: Free Spirits United
results.description: In a past life, you were both free-spirited adventurers. Your souls crossed paths at markets, festivals, and distant lands. In this life, you'll find each other through shared enthusiasm for life, art, and adventure. Your love is colorful and ever-changing.
results.comment: Tips: While exploring life together, remember to build a stable foundation. The best adventures have a home base to return to.

results.title: Star-Crossed Destiny
results.description: Your past-life connection was profound and fateful — perhaps a grand love story separated by circumstance. In this life, the universe conspires to bring you together again. When you meet, you'll feel an overwhelming sense of recognition that defies logic.
results.comment: Tips: This intense connection can be overwhelming. Take your time — let love unfold naturally rather than trying to rush destiny.

title: Love Instruction Manual
description: This is your personalized Love Instruction Manual. Through 15 everyday scenarios, we'll analyze your love language, conflict style, and ideal partner type.

questions.text: On a weekend morning, what's your ideal scenario with your partner?

options.text: Making breakfast together, chatting about plans for the day
Cuddling in bed, scrolling phones together
Each doing their own thing, occasionally exchanging smiles
Going out separately, meeting up later for dinner

questions.text: Your partner sends you a long, heartfelt message. Your response?

options.text: Immediately call them — text can't express what you feel
Carefully type an equally long reply
Send a heart emoji and say 'me too'
Feel a bit overwhelmed, reply briefly after thinking

questions.text: How would you prefer to celebrate an anniversary?

options.text: A romantic candlelit dinner for two
Travel to a place you've always wanted to visit
Cozy movie night at home
A simple acknowledgment — fancy celebrations feel forced

questions.text: You're upset about something at work. What do you want from your partner?

options.text: A big hug and words of comfort
Listen patiently without giving advice
Help analyze the problem and find solutions
Give me space — I need to process alone first

questions.text: You notice your partner is in a bad mood. What do you do?

options.text: Ask directly what happened and offer help
Quietly sit beside them, letting them know you're there
Prepare their favorite food or drink
Give them space and check in later

questions.text: Which love language means the most to you?

options.text: Words of affirmation — hearing 'I love you' daily
Physical touch — holding hands, hugging
Acts of service — they do things for you
Quality time — undivided attention together

questions.text: After an argument, who usually initiates reconciliation?

options.text: I always go first — can't stand being in a fight
We both cool down, then whoever's ready first reaches out
I wait a bit, but will eventually make the first move
I wait for them to come to me

questions.text: What would really disappoint you in a partner?

options.text: Being emotionally cold and distant
Breaking promises or being dishonest
Not respecting my personal boundaries
Being too clingy and controlling

questions.text: At a party, your partner talks to an attractive stranger for a long time. Your reaction?

options.text: Walk over and naturally join the conversation
Trust them completely, continue talking to your own friends
Feel a bit uneasy, keep glancing over
Bring it up tactfully afterwards

questions.text: Do you think couples should share phone passwords?

options.text: Of course! Nothing to hide from each other
It's fine either way, depends on the couple
I'd rather not — everyone deserves privacy
Definitely no. Trust shouldn't require surveillance

questions.text: What's your ideal frequency of dates?

options.text: Every day if possible — can't get enough
3-4 times a week is perfect
Once or twice a week — quality over quantity
A few times a month is enough

questions.text: If your partner wanted to change careers into something risky, you'd…

options.text: Fully support them — dreams are worth chasing
Support but suggest practical planning first
Express concern and hope they think carefully
Honestly share your worries about financial stability

questions.text: How important is meeting each other's families?

options.text: Very important — family approval matters a lot
Important, but it's our relationship that matters most
Not essential — as long as we're happy
We can deal with it when the time comes

questions.text: If you could describe your ideal relationship in one word, it'd be…

options.text: Warmth
Growth
Freedom
Balance

questions.text: What do you think is the secret to making love last?

options.text: Never stop expressing love and appreciation
Growing and evolving together
Respecting each other's individuality
Honest communication, even when it's hard

results.title: The Independent Thinker
results.description: You value personal space and rational thinking in love. You believe the best relationships are two complete people choosing each other, not two halves desperately seeking completion. Your love style is measured and thoughtful.
results.comment: Tips: Your independence is admirable, but don't forget to occasionally let your guard down and let your partner in. Vulnerability is also a form of strength.

results.title: The Steady Partner
results.description: You approach love with a balanced and grounded perspective. Neither too clingy nor too distant, you know how to give space while staying connected. You're the type of partner who builds lasting relationships through consistent, reliable affection.
results.comment: Tips: Your balanced approach is a real strength. Try adding more spontaneous romantic gestures occasionally — they can bring fresh energy to a stable relationship.

results.title: The Passionate Devotee
results.description: Love is central to your life. You express feelings openly, crave closeness, and pour your heart into relationships. Your love style is warm, attentive, and deeply caring — your partner always knows how much they mean to you.
results.comment: Tips: Your warmth is beautiful, but remember that sometimes the best way to love is to give your partner room to miss you. A healthy balance keeps the spark alive.

results.title: The All-In Romantic
results.description: You love with your whole heart, holding nothing back. Romance, passion, and emotional connection are your oxygen. You believe love should be celebrated loudly and often — and you're not afraid to show it.
results.comment: Tips: Your intensity is beautiful, but be careful not to overwhelm your partner. The best love stories also include chapters where each person shines on their own.

title: Crush Radar: Your Lovesick Index
description: Everyone says you fall too hard too fast? Through 10 everyday scenarios, find out how susceptible you are to catching feelings.

questions.text: Someone you just met sends you a 'Good morning' text the next day. Your reaction?

options.text: That's nice, reply politely and move on
Smile a little, think 'they remembered me'
Heart skips a beat, start crafting the perfect reply
Already imagining what your future dates will look like

questions.text: You see someone attractive on the subway making eye contact. What happens in your head?

options.text: Nothing much, go back to scrolling your phone
Quick internal note: 'Oh, cute.' Then move on
Start a whole mental storyline about running into them again
Consider getting off at the same stop to 'accidentally' bump into them

questions.text: Someone you like sends you a song. What do you do?

options.text: Listen once, reply 'Nice song'
Look up the lyrics to see if there's a hidden message
Put it on repeat and analyze every line
Already making it 'our song' in your head

questions.text: Your crush accidentally touches your hand. Your internal reaction?

options.text: Notice it, but stay cool
Feel a little spark, but play it off
Heart rate goes up, replay the moment for hours
That one touch keeps you awake at night

questions.text: How often do you check if your crush is online?

options.text: Never; that's not my style
Once in a while, if I happen to be on the app
Check their last-seen status throughout the day
You practically have their online schedule memorized

questions.text: You overhear someone mention your crush's name. Your reaction?

options.text: Ears perk up slightly, but you stay cool
Casually tune in to see what they're saying
Immediately laser-focus on the conversation
Can't help but join in: 'Wait, what about them?!'

questions.text: Your crush posts a photo on social media. What do you do?

options.text: Scroll past; I don't react to every post
Like it casually, move on
Like it, zoom in, analyze the background and who's in it
Screenshot, analyze, then debate whether to comment

questions.text: You're about to meet your crush. How much time do you spend getting ready?

options.text: Normal routine, same as meeting anyone
A few extra minutes to look presentable
Change outfits at least twice, check the mirror ten times
Full fashion show at home, ask friends to vote on the best look

questions.text: Your friend says your crush might like someone else. Your reaction?

options.text: Oh well, that's life. Move on
A little disappointed, but you'll be okay
Mood drops, you need ice cream and sad music tonight
Entire world collapses. You start an investigation immediately

questions.text: If you could describe your current state of falling for someone, it'd be…

options.text: I'm firmly on dry land. Completely stable
Gently swaying in a boat, enjoying the breeze
The boat is rocking and I'm getting dizzy
I've already capsized and I'm drowning happily

results.title: 【Ironclad】 Emotionally Bulletproof
results.description: Your heart is like a fortress — nothing gets in easily. You approach feelings with extreme rationality and self-control. It takes a LOT to even make you blink romantically.
results.comment: Tips: Being self-sufficient is great, but don't forget that letting someone past your walls can be one of life's greatest adventures. Consider opening the gate once in a while.

results.title: 【Gentle Breeze】Light Crush Alert
results.description: You feel the occasional flutter but always have your feet on the ground. You can appreciate someone's charm without losing your composure. Your romantic antennae are working, but you're not overwhelmed by signals.
results.comment: Tips: Your balanced approach is healthy. Just make sure you don't overthink things to the point of missing genuine connections. Sometimes it's okay to follow the flutter.

results.title: 【Seasick】Moderate Lovesickness
results.description: Your ship is clearly rocking! You're very susceptible to romantic gestures and small signals. When you like someone, it shows — in your behavior, your mood, and probably your search history.
results.comment: Tips: Your romantic nature is a gift! Just make sure you're reading signals correctly. Not every 'Good morning' text means 'I want to marry you.' Take a breath.

results.title: 【Sinking Ship】Hopelessly Lovesick
results.description: The lifeguard alarm is going off! You practically catch feelings the moment someone gives you the slightest sunshine. When it comes to your crush, all rationality goes overboard — you've completely and utterly capsized.
results.comment: Tips: SOS! Keep your friends on speed-dial for reality checks. Love yourself first before diving in — don't lose yourself in someone else's waters!

title: Do We Have a Future Together?
description: 15 situational questions to deeply analyze your compatibility, communication chemistry, and future potential — revealing where this relationship might go.

questions.text: You planned to meet on the weekend, but she suddenly says she needs to reschedule. Your first reaction?

options.text: No problem — proactively suggest another time
A bit disappointed, but you say it's fine
Feel uncomfortable inside, but won't say it
Feel like she doesn't value your plans

questions.text: When you two chat, how do conversations usually go?

options.text: Can't stop talking, often chatting until dawn
A few reliable topics, occasionally sparks fly
Mostly you initiating, she doesn't respond much
Often left on read or takes forever to reply

questions.text: When you're feeling down, would you want to tell her?

options.text: Yes, she's the first person I think of
I'd hesitate, but would end up telling her
Probably not, afraid of being a burden
Not at all — we haven't reached that level

questions.text: She goes out with a guy friend. How do you feel?

options.text: Totally fine — I trust her
Slightly bothered, but won't show it
Jealous — can't help asking for details
Super anxious, feel like I could be replaced anytime

questions.text: How does she look at you?

options.text: With a smile that makes you feel cared for
Natural and comfortable, like a friend
Hard to read — sometimes you can't tell
Seems the same as how she looks at everyone

questions.text: Have you two ever argued or disagreed? How was it handled?

options.text: Yes, but we communicate honestly and grow closer
Occasional friction, but we cool down and make up
Silent treatment until someone breaks first
Almost never argue — we're not close enough for that

questions.text: Have you ever imagined living together?

options.text: Countless times — even planned what to have for breakfast
Sometimes — I think it'd be nice
Rarely — it still feels far away
Never — doesn't seem possible

questions.text: If she got a new haircut today, would you notice?

options.text: I'd be the first to notice and compliment her
Probably notice, but might not say anything
Only if she pointed it out
Probably wouldn't notice at all

questions.text: Would you change some of your habits for her?

options.text: Yes, as long as it's for the better
Can try, but don't want to change too much
Depends — don't want to compromise myself
No, she should accept the real me

questions.text: Can you be your true self around her?

options.text: Absolutely — no pretending needed
Mostly, but sometimes I try to impress
Often self-conscious, can't fully relax
Almost always performing, afraid the real me isn't enough

questions.text: When she's in trouble, what do you usually do?

options.text: Show up immediately, willing to help with anything
Send a message to check if she needs help
Watch from afar, but don't actively reach out
Feel it's her life, better not to interfere

questions.text: Would you introduce her to your close friends?

options.text: Already have — they all like her
Looking for the right moment to introduce
Haven't thought about it — doesn't feel time yet
Would rather not — worried friends might judge

questions.text: Do you two have any inside jokes or unspoken signals?

options.text: Tons — we can read each other's thoughts with a look
A few exclusive memes or jokes
Maybe a little, but hard to describe
Almost none — we don't interact enough

questions.text: If she told you 'I like you' right now, you'd…

options.text: Feel like I've been waiting for this! Confess right back
Be happily surprised, but need a moment to process
Unsure of my own feelings — might say 'let me think'
Be confused — doesn't seem realistic

questions.text: Looking back from when you met until now, how has this relationship changed you?

options.text: Into a better person — she makes me want to improve
Learned a lot about love
Mixed feelings — both joy and struggle
Not much change — everything's been pretty flat

results.title: A Passing Meteor
results.description: There may have been a brief spark, but overall your frequencies aren't on the same wavelength. She may be a passing figure in your life who taught you about attraction, but this relationship is unlikely to go the distance. It's not that you're not good enough — timing and fate just aren't aligned.
results.comment: Tips: Instead of fixating on an uncertain answer, channel that energy into becoming your best self. When the right person comes along, everything will feel easy and natural.

results.title: A Lingering Moonlight
results.description: There's a subtle chemistry between you, but you're stuck in the 'something but nothing' phase. Your feelings seem stronger than hers, leaving you in a constant state of uncertainty. There's potential, but it needs more courage and clear action.
results.comment: Tips: Ambiguity fades with time. If you truly care, try expressing your feelings more directly. Regardless of outcome, at least you won't regret not trying.

results.title: A Warming Dawn
results.description: Your relationship is in a warm, steadily rising phase. You share growing chemistry and mutual interest, with conversations becoming more natural. She's gaining weight in your heart, and she seems to have feelings beyond friendship too. Just one step more and this could bloom.
results.comment: Tips: Now is the perfect time! Don't wait for the feeling to cool. Create more one-on-one moments and let the relationship naturally transition.

results.title: A Mutual Sunshine
results.description: Congratulations — your connection is incredibly strong! From daily chemistry to emotional investment to mutual trust, everything points to extraordinary potential. You don't just attract each other; you can be your authentic selves together. That's the most precious thing.
results.comment: Tips: You have all the ingredients for a lasting relationship. Now just say it out loud — don't let this perfect moment slip away. She's probably waiting for you to take that step.

results.title: A Once-in-a-Lifetime Aurora
results.description: This is a once-in-a-century compatibility! Trust, chemistry, communication, and emotional depth are all at near-perfect levels. With her, you can completely let your guard down; with you, she feels utterly safe. This isn't just romance — it's soul-level resonance.
results.comment: Tips: Don't waste this kind of fate! You're standing at the doorstep of happiness — just reach out to each other. Cherish this person, because a feeling this certain might only come once in a lifetime.

title: Love Radar: Match Your Romantic Frequency
description: Through 10 everyday scenarios, painlessly discover your true 'romantic pace.' Share with your crush to see if you're on the same wavelength!

questions.text: After a first solo movie date, what's your ideal next move?

options.text: Find a nice restaurant to sit down and chat over dinner
Go for a casual walk nearby, grab a drink
Go with the flow, decide based on the vibe
It's getting late, just head home separately

questions.text: Your honest take on 'text reply speed'?

options.text: Want quick replies — slow responses trigger inner drama
Reply when I see it, no need to be instant — no pressure
Prefer scheduled replies, don't like being tied to messages
Depends on mood and schedule — sometimes a whole day is normal

questions.text: How long is the perfect 'flirting stage' before defining a relationship?

options.text: 1-2 weeks — if it feels right, lock it down fast
1-3 months — the sweet push-and-pull is the best part
3-6 months — take it slow, observe carefully
No timeline — maybe don't even need a clear label

questions.text: You have a rare free weekend. How do you usually spend it?

options.text: Plan an outdoor activity with someone you like
One day out, one day staying home to recharge
Already packed with plans and social events
No plans — sleep in and figure it out later

questions.text: At a friend gathering, someone attractive starts chatting you up. You'd…

options.text: Enthusiastically engage, work to keep the conversation going
Chat politely, quietly assess how they feel
Feel shy, mostly listen and nod along
Keep distance — not comfortable getting friendly fast

questions.text: Your view on 'romantic gestures' (anniversaries, birthday surprises)?

options.text: Extremely important! They're essential spice for daily life
Nice to have occasionally, no need to go overboard
Depends on the mood, take it or leave it
Too much hassle — keeping things simple is real love

questions.text: If you're in the flirting stage, must you say 'goodnight' every night?

options.text: Absolutely! It shows you're thinking of each other
Most of the time, but forgetting is no big deal
Not necessarily — falling asleep mid-chat is normal
Feels too formulaic — no need to force it

questions.text: What's the best way to truly get to know someone?

options.text: Travel together — see how they handle unexpected situations
Late-night deep talks about values and the past
Watch how they treat friends and family in daily life
Through casual daily chats and life's small moments

questions.text: When you realize you like someone, what do you usually do?

options.text: Go for it — actively create opportunities to let them know
Drop subtle hints, see how they respond
Observe quietly, too afraid to make obvious moves
Leave it to fate and the universe

questions.text: Your current attitude toward future relationships?

options.text: Really want a stable, long-lasting relationship
Looking forward to love, but no rush to force it
Single life is fine too — whatever happens, happens
Not focused on romance right now — living my best solo life

results.title: 【Glacier Type】 The Zen Observer
results.description: Your romantic pace moves like a glacier — slow, steady, and deliberately cautious. You prioritize personal space above all and don't like being pressured to define things or speed up the timeline.
results.comment: Love Strategy: Direct approaches won't work. Start as a 'friend with shared interests' and use pressure-free daily companionship to slowly melt the ice.

results.title: 【Temperate Type】The Cautious Observer
results.description: You don't reject love, but you never rush in. You prefer watching from a safe distance, assessing values and habits before making a move. Trust takes time to build — you like love that flows like a gentle stream.
results.comment: Love Strategy: Don't rush! Instead of elaborate dates, try multiple casual walks with honest conversation. Make them feel 'comfortable and safe' around you.

results.title: 【Subtropical Type】The Easygoing Balancer
results.description: Your romantic rhythm is the most comfortable! You know how to enjoy flirty tension while also knowing when to show sincerity. You give space but also crave romantic moments — being with you feels like a spring breeze.
results.comment: Love Strategy: Your pace is great! Try adding subtle romantic probes into daily conversation — like 'Let's go together next time' — and watch how they respond.

results.title: 【Tropical Type】The Direct Action-Taker
results.description: Like or dislike — you draw clear lines. You hate pointless guessing games and think dragging out ambiguity is a waste of time. When you spot someone you like, you make moves fast and decisively.
results.comment: Love Strategy: The best response to a direct approach is to be direct back! If you're also interested, don't play too coy — show your enthusiasm and they'll feel they've found a kindred spirit.

results.title: 【Volcanic Type】The Lightning-Fast Romantic
results.description: 'If it feels right, just go for it!' You bring massive passion and action to love. You trust your gut, love fiery chemistry, and despise slow-burn games. You're the type who can ignite love in an instant.
results.comment: Love Strategy: Get ready for a whirlwind romance! But before diving in, do a quick values check — make sure your fundamentals are aligned for the long run!

title: Love Brain Index Test
description: Does your IQ drop to zero when you fall in love? Or do you remain totally rational? Take these 10 situational questions to find out your 'Love Brain' index.

questions.text: Your partner said something hurtful today. Your first reaction?

options.text: Assume they were just angry and make excuses for them
Feel sad initially, but a little coaxing makes you forgive
Directly point out the problem and demand an apology
Calmly analyze their intention and secretly deduct points

questions.text: In the early dating stage, they suddenly act cold. What do you do?

options.text: Feel anxious and constantly reflect on whether you did wrong
Test the waters, but give up if they stay cold
Play it cool and refocus on your own life
Decide they are emotionally unstable and cut them off

questions.text: All your friends warn you, 'This person is not right for you.' You would...

options.text: Nod on the outside, but continue loving them blindly
Listen, but believe your love can change them
Start evaluating the relationship and raise your guard
Hit the brakes immediately if friends have valid points

questions.text: If love has a max score of 100, what score do you give them at start?

options.text: 100 instantly! Once in love, they are perfect
80. First impressions were great so they start high
A passing 50. Let them slowly earn points
0. Everyone starts as strangers; that's only fair

questions.text: Your partner commits a cardinal sin but cries for forgiveness.

options.text: Feel uncontrollably sorry and forgive immediately
Be furious, but ultimately give them one more chance
Forgive, but set strict probation and clear boundaries
Rules are rules. Crossing the line means permanent exit

questions.text: You have weekend plans with friends, but your partner wants to see you.

options.text: Cancel on friends; my partner comes first
Try to compromise by asking if partner can join
Reassure them, but stick to original plans
Tell them to find something to do; don't mess with my schedule

questions.text: In a stable relationship, do you change your style for them?

options.text: Absolutely, I'll change into whatever they like
I'll cater to their taste occasionally
Consider good suggestions but keep my own style
Never. They have to accept the real me

questions.text: Your partner puts a new password on their phone and acts secretive.

options.text: Feel uneasy, but convince yourself to 'give privacy'
Overthink endlessly, but afraid to ask and ruin things
Ask directly and demand a reasonable explanation
Pretend not to notice, start gathering evidence to leave

questions.text: Looking back, what is usually your main reason for breaking up?

options.text: Enduring countless disappointments until my heart breaks
Realizing they will never change, and leaving sadly
Noticing mismatched future goals; preferring short-term pain
Crossed my bottom line or lost feelings. Decisive

questions.text: To you, what is the ideal state of love?

options.text: Sticking together daily to share everything
Mutual reliance; they are my strongest safe haven
Independent but supportive; we shine individually
Just icing on the cake; I can live well without romance

results.title: Love Brain 0%: The Cold Rationalist
results.description: Your brain is bulletproof! You are a pragmatist in love. Sweet words do nothing to you; you value actions over promises. Even when dating, you always put your own feelings and career absolutely first.
results.comment: Exclusive Analysis: Being wide awake protects you from getting hurt, but letting your guard down sometimes isn't a bad experience.

results.title: Love Brain 30%: The Flexible Warrior
results.description: You balance reason and emotion perfectly. You enjoy the romance, but your boundaries are firm. If they show red flags, you immediately retract and prepare to exit gracefully.
results.comment: Exclusive Analysis: This principled style is very healthy! Keep it up, and you'll find happiness without losing yourself.

results.title: Love Brain 75%: The Romantic with a Pink Filter
results.description: You definitely have a love brain! Once you like someone, you view them through an ultra-thick beauty filter. When issues arise, you easily soften and make excuses for them.
results.comment: Exclusive Analysis: Your gentleness is a great asset, but if the filter cracks, be brave enough to admit it instead of lying to yourself.

results.title: Love Brain 999%: Hopeless Pure Love Devotee
results.description: Severe terminal love brain! When in love, your IQ zeroes out, and the world is just them. You endlessly compromise and sacrifice. If they are happy, you swallow any grievance.
results.comment: Exclusive Analysis: Pure love is invincible! But a relationship should make both of you shine, not dim your light to illuminate them. Love yourself more!

title: Midnight EMO Frequency Quiz
description: Social butterfly by day, social phobic by night? Discover your 'midnight inner monologue' type and see if you're a Revenge Bedtime Champion or Schrödinger's Melancholy Clown!

questions.text: It's 1 AM, your phone screen is still on. What are you looking at?

options.text: Funny shorts or memes, can't stop scrolling, brain is hyper
Scrolling through others' stories, feeling a bit anxious and comparing
Listening to sad songs, staring at chat logs of someone who won't contact you anymore
Already on Do Not Disturb, just checking the time before going back to sleep

questions.text: Suddenly recalling something wrong you said in public 5 years ago. Your reaction?

options.text: Whatever! Who remembers it now? Quick, watch the next video to distract
Twisting in bed, mentally rehearsing 100 times 'what I should have said'
Feeling like a failure who always messes up, letting out a long sigh
5 years ago? I don't even remember what I had for dinner yesterday

questions.text: A friend texts at 2 AM: 'I'm so sad...'. What do you do?

options.text: Send 10 dark humor memes or funny stickers to force a laugh
Analyze the situation with them, ending up getting anxious yourself
Instantly reply 'What's wrong? I'm here', totally empathizing and almost crying
See it at 8 AM, calmly reply: 'Sorry I was asleep, are you okay?'

questions.text: While taking a shower, what's running through your mind?

options.text: Holding a solo concert, or rehearsing an award acceptance speech
Reviewing everything that happened today, criticizing your own performance
Pondering the meaning of life, the end of the universe, and why nobody understands you
Spacing out. Thinking the water is a bit hot, turning it down

questions.text: Seeing a super EMO (emotional) long post on Threads. What do you do?

options.text: Swipe away. Too long, I only want funny stuff
Quietly finish reading, think 'Wow this is literally me', and heart it
Can't help but leave a comforting comment, feeling everyone has it hard
Think 'This person has too much free time', close the app and sleep

questions.text: If your 'midnight mood' were a song, what genre would it be?

options.text: EDM Party: Brain spinning, getting hyped, don't want the day to end
Indie Rock: Full of murmurs, confusion, and unanswered questions
Ballad: A sad love song that almost makes you cry on the first note
White Noise: Calm, peaceful, only the sound of rhythmic breathing

questions.text: You have an important early morning interview/date tomorrow. Your state tonight?

options.text: Tell yourself to sleep early, but fingers can't stop scrolling until the last minute
Lie in bed frantically rehearsing all possible disasters, can't sleep at all
Worry about performing poorly, lose confidence, sink into a low mood spiral
Set three alarms, fall asleep the second you hit the pillow

questions.text: If you could invent a magic pill, what would you want it to cure?

options.text: The 'clown mask syndrome' of feeling like a joke at night
The 'severe mental drain' of overthinking someone's casual words
The 'midnight fragility' of inexplicably feeling lonely and wanting to cry
No need for pills, my mental and physical state is healthy as steel

questions.text: When you feel overwhelmed by emotions, how do you usually vent?

options.text: Binge eating midnight snacks or shopping, filling the void with dopamine
Posting cryptic complaints on a private account or Threads that only you understand
Crying hard, or writing a long memo essay that will never be sent
Sleep. After waking up, the world will return to normal

questions.text: To sum up, what does 'midnight' mean to you?

options.text: My only 'free time' of the day, absolutely nobody can take it away
A cruel mirror reflecting all the anxiety and insecurity hidden during the day
A giant bomb shelter where I can secretly lick my wounds
It's just the brain's time to repair and recharge, what else?

results.title: 【Revenge Bedtime Champion】
results.description: 'I'm not staying up late, I'm reclaiming the freedom I couldn't get during the day.' Your EMO frequency is very low because you simply don't have time to be sad! You refuse to sleep because midnight is the only time you control. A normal person by day, a web-surfing master by night. As long as your phone has battery, you can party till dawn.
results.comment: Exclusive Analysis: Your hidden toxicity is using temporary pleasure to numb yourself, escaping real-world pressure. Try sleeping earlier and bringing that control back to your daytime!

results.title: 【Midnight Ruminator】
results.description: 'At 2 AM, I promptly recall a wrong sentence I said 5 years ago, and feel too awkward to sleep.' Your EMO is anxiety-driven. A strict disciplinary committee lives in your brain, replaying all your awkward moments and wrong decisions every midnight. Others have long forgotten, but you still punish yourself.
results.comment: Exclusive Analysis: Your hidden toxicity is severe mental drain, torturing yourself with others' mistakes or your own minor flaws. Let it go, nobody really cares about 5 years ago!

results.title: 【Schrödinger's Melancholy Clown】
results.description: 'Post about how terrible I feel, but immediately reply "Haha I'm fine" when someone comforts me.' You have pure midnight EMO constitution. Highly empathetic, you easily feel lonely at night. Magically, after a good sleep, you switch back to a sunny personality as if the crying person wasn't you.
results.comment: Exclusive Analysis: Your hidden toxicity is carrying others' emotions while craving salvation yet pushing away care. It's okay to admit your fragility!

results.title: 【Iron-Walled Sleep God】
results.description: 'What is EMO? Can I eat it? As long as I sleep fast enough, sadness can't catch me.' You are the rarest human! Extremely rational and emotionally stable, you believe a good sleep is better than self-pity. Others' EMO stories sound like alien language to you.
results.comment: Exclusive Analysis: Your hidden toxicity is that your excessive rationality sometimes makes sensitive friends think you are cold-blooded. Showing a little human touch occasionally isn't bad!

title: Should We Break Up? Relationship Checkup
description: A deep dive into your relationship status. Through 10 real-life scenarios, discover if it's time to let go or if your relationship just needs some repair.

questions.text: When you think about your 'five-year plan', what's your first reaction?

options.text: He's not in the picture at all, and I even feel he'd be an obstacle.
The future feels blurry, and I dare not think about him being in it.
I sometimes worry our future paths differ, but I still want to try.
Every image of the future includes him, and I'm really looking forward to it.

questions.text: When you two have an argument recently, how does it usually end?

options.text: It's never resolved, ending in silent treatment or personal attacks.
I compromise just to avoid fighting, but I feel very wronged inside.
I get mad at the moment, but we talk it out and understand each other later.
We rarely have huge fights; we discuss rationally and find common ground.

questions.text: Looking back, what is the main reason you are 'still' with him right now?

options.text: Just out of habit, fear of being alone, or thinking breaking up is a hassle.
He has some good qualities, and I hate to give up the current stability.
Even though his flaws give me headaches, I still care deeply about him.
Because being with him makes me a better, happier version of myself.

questions.text: If starting tomorrow, he never changed his 'fatal flaw', could you accept it?

options.text: Absolutely not. I've already had enough and feel suffocated.
It would be very painful. I might explode if I endure it a bit longer.
I'd feel a bit helpless, but I'm willing to tolerate or find a balance.
Totally fine. Nobody is perfect, and I love every part of him.

questions.text: When something happy or upsetting happens outside, who do you want to share it with first?

options.text: Definitely not him. Telling him might even ruin my mood.
It used to be him, but now it's usually my best friends.
I'd still want to tell him, even though he might not get my point sometimes.
Of course him! He's always my safe haven and personal cheerleader.

questions.text: When you're with him, do you feel you can be your 'true self'?

options.text: Not at all. I constantly walk on eggshells around him; it's suffocating.
Half and half. I hide many thoughts and feelings from him.
Mostly yes, I just actively avoid certain trigger topics.
100% yes. Even at my absolute worst, I feel completely relaxed around him.

questions.text: Regarding your physical intimacy (holding hands, hugs, or sex), what is the current state?

options.text: I even slightly reject his touch; I have absolutely zero interest.
It feels like a routine, or the frequency has dropped to freezing point.
Sometimes it feels a bit plain, but I still love the warmth of his hugs.
Extremely compatible. Holding hands or hugging still gives me butterflies.

questions.text: When you see other happy couples, what goes through your mind?

options.text: Intensely jealous, even thinking 'why is my relationship so terrible'.
I feel their partners are better, and start feeling dissatisfied with mine.
I occasionally compare, but I know every relationship has its own issues.
We have our own unique way of being happy; no need to envy others.

questions.text: If you were single right now, knowing what you know about him, would you still choose to date him?

options.text: Absolutely not. I even feel like I was blind back then.
Probably not. This relationship drains way too much of my energy.
I probably still would. After all, we have many irreplaceable good memories.
Without a doubt! If I could choose a hundred times, I'd still choose him.

questions.text: Deep down, what outcome do you actually hope to get from this quiz?

options.text: I hope it tells me to 'break up now', giving me the courage and an excuse to leave.
I hope it makes the decision for me, because I'm too drained to think.
I hope it tells me 'it's salvageable' and how to repair the relationship.
Just taking it out of curiosity; I know we won't actually break up.

results.title: 【Red Alert: It's time to let yourself go】
results.description: Your subconscious has already given you the answer. This relationship is currently toxic and oppressive, constantly draining your confidence and energy. You're likely staying only because of fear of change or the sunk cost.
results.comment: Exclusive Analysis: Love shouldn't make you feel suffocated. Please face your inner voice bravely. Only by leaving the wrong person can you free your hands to embrace the right self. It's time to cut your losses.

results.title: 【Battery Depleted: Suffocating Bottleneck】
results.description: Your relationship is sick. The past passion has been worn out by daily quarrels, indifference, or misunderstandings. You're in a 'tasteless to eat, but a pity to throw away' state, feeling tired but not knowing how to fix it.
results.comment: Exclusive Analysis: Pretending everything is fine will only make it worse. You need a deeply honest 'heart-to-heart', or even consider taking a break to calm down. If neither is willing to change, letting go might just be a matter of time.

results.title: 【Adjustment Period: The love is there, but needs a tune-up】
results.description: The foundation of your relationship is still there; you're just encountering some practical friction or communication blind spots. Your confusion comes from differences in habits, not a fundamental lack of love.
results.comment: Exclusive Analysis: Romance doesn't stay in the honeymoon phase forever. This is a turning point. Try shifting from 'what are you mad about' to 'how can we fix this'. With more tolerance and less impulsiveness, you will get through this.

results.title: 【Solid as a Rock: Just a temporary doubt, don't worry】
results.description: Your relationship is incredibly healthy and stable! You might have just had a small fight, or are simply curious. Deep down, you know they are the right one. You have great communication and a shared vision of the future.
results.comment: Exclusive Analysis: Congratulations on having a fairytale-like relationship! Occasional friction is just the spice of life. Remember to give them a big hug tonight and tell them how much you love them!
